desc: Spacious 3-bedroom townhouse with finished walk-out basement. Fireplace in living room. Close to train, bus, and ferry to NYC.
description:
Spacious 3-bedroom townhouse offering comfortable living with a finished walk-out basement that provides valuable extra space for a rec room, home office, or gym.

The living room features a cozy fireplace. Excellent commuter location — close to NJ Transit train, bus routes, and the NY Waterway ferry to NYC.
